# Support

## How to Get Help
- Usage questions: use GitHub Discussions.
- Bugs: open a Bug Report issue.
- Feature ideas: open a Feature Request issue.
- Security concerns: follow SECURITY.md and use private disclosure.

## Response Expectations
This is a community-driven project. Response times may vary.

## Before Opening a Request
- Read the README and package READMEs.
- Check existing issues and discussions.
- Share a minimal reproduction when possible.
